_meta.description: Numeric reconciliation and tie-out requirements for answer safety.

rules.trigger: bank_reconciliation equation does not hold for same period and currency.
rules.check: facts.bookBalance != null AND facts.statementBalance != null AND facts.adjustments != null AND facts.reconciledBalance != null AND Math.abs((bookBalance + adjustments) - statementBalance) > tolerance
examples: Missing outstanding items in bank tie-out.
Reconciled amount computed with wrong currency scale.

rules.trigger: Sum of row amounts and reported total in same table are materially different.
examples: Line items total 98,200 but table total shows 98,000 without rounding note.
Component sum not equal to declared grand total.

rules.trigger: Numeric comparisons cross currencies without explicit FX statement.
Reconciliation spans multiple periods without aligned bucket boundaries.
Opening + movement != closing in rollforward table.
